empty.title: No roles defined
empty.message: Create the first security role using the New Role button.

confirmDelete.title: Delete Role
confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this role? All permissions assigned to this role will also be removed.

confirmSave.title: Save Role
confirmSave.message: Do you want to save this role?

empty.title: No menu definitions
empty.message: Create the first menu definition or sync existing navigation nodes from the registry.

confirmDelete.title: Delete Menu Definition
confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this menu definition? Role permissions for this menu node will also be removed.

confirmSave.title: Save Menu Definition
confirmSave.message: Do you want to save this menu definition?

confirmSync.title: Sync from Registry
confirmSync.message: This will add any navigation nodes from the frontend registry that are not yet in the catalog. Existing definitions will not be modified.

entity.heading: Entity Permissions
entity.name: Entity
entity.emptySelection: Select an entity above to view its attribute permissions.

attribute.heading: Attribute Permissions: {{ entity }}
attribute.name: Attribute
attribute.none: This entity has no enumerated attributes.

confirmSave.title: Save Permissions
confirmSave.message: Do you want to save the permission changes?
